name: vibe-plugins
description: The Vibe Plugins ecosystem — spec-driven development, documentation, security, and testing for vibe-coded apps. Each plugin is independently versioned; installing this marketplace gives you the full set.

plugins.name: vibe-sec
plugins.description: Security scanner and fix generator for vibe-coded apps. Classification-driven. Tiered by deployment context.

plugins.name: vibe-test
plugins.description: Test analyzer and generator for vibe-coded apps. Classifies by app type and maturity tier, measures coverage honestly (no cherry-picked denominators), generates tests proportional to deployment risk — and catches the broken harnesses every other test tool assumes away.
